modules: Feature modules por dominio (house, zone, resource, rule, task, resident)
layers: Controller -> Service -> Repository -> Prisma (3 capas + patrones nombrados)
auth: F1: ninguno (role field sembrado, sin login) -> F3: Google OAuth + RLS enforcement
security: Helmet + CORS + @nestjs/throttler (activos) - RLS Postgres (F2, policies en migraciones Prisma + SET app.current_resident por request)
resilience: Graceful DB degradation (health check ya existe) - sin circuit breaker
deployment: Docker multi-arch, self-hosted Mac Mini M1 (Hermes)
external_services: BullMQ+Redis (cola recordatorios) - Sentry - Telegram/Twilio-sandbox (F1 ping) - WhatsApp Meta Cloud API (F2/F3) - Google OAuth (F3)
